description_long: This is a modern two-seater sofa upholstered in a deep blue fabric, featuring a clean, boxy silhouette with straight lines and a minimalist design. The sofa has two large seat cushions and two backrest cushions, all of which are uniform in size and appear to be loose rather than attached. Three medium-sized, loose gray throw pillows are arranged on the seat, adding contrast and comfort. The armrests are straight, thick, and padded, extending from the base to just below the top of the backrest. The sofa stands on four short, cylindrical legs with a dark finish, slightly elevating it off the ground. The upholstery has a subtle, matte texture with no visible patterns or decorative stitching, giving it a sleek and contemporary appearance.
description: A modern, deep blue two-seater sofa with straight padded armrests, loose seat and back cushions, and three gray throw pillows. The design is minimalist with short, dark cylindrical legs and a matte fabric finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large seat and back cushions, three gray throw pillows, and straight padded armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the sofa's boxy profile, thick armrest, and the depth of the seat and cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, unadorned backrest and the sofa's overall width.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the armrest and cushion arrangement, emphasizing the sofa's symmetry.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, loose seat cushions and two matching backrest cushions, all uniform in size, with three loose gray throw pillows placed on the seat.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, thick, and padded armrests at each end, extending from the seat base to just below the top of the backrest, with a boxy, minimalist profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, cylindrical legs positioned at the corners, with a dark finish and a simple, exposed design.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight, and continuous backrest with two large, loose cushions and no visible tufting or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid blue fabric with a subtle, matte texture and no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
